languages.text: "Выдвигаю требование на приоритетное право проведения святодиагностики реликвии. Мои исследования данных ксеносов ускорят постижение и излечение недуга машинного духа". {n}Обменявшись несколькими резкими продолжительными бинарными трелями, техножрецы, кажется, достигают согласия.{/n}

"I claim priority right to perform sacred diagnostics on the relic. My research of the xenos data will expedite understanding and the curing of the machine spirit's ailment." {n}After exchanging a few sharp, prolonged binharic trills, the Tech-Priests seem to reach an agreement.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Выдвигаю требование на приоритетное право проведения святодиагностики реликвии. Мои исследования данных ксеносов ускорят постижение и излечение недуга машинного духа". {n}Обменявшись несколькими резкими продолжительными бинарными трелями, техножрецы, кажется, достигают согласия.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I claim priority right to perform sacred diagnostics on the relic. My research of the xenos data will speed up understanding and curing the machine spirit's ailment." {n}After exchanging a few sharp, prolonged binharic trills, the Tech-Priests seem to reach an agreement.{/n}

"I claim priority right to perform sacred diagnostics on the relic. My research of the xenos data will speed up understanding and curing the machine spirit's ailment." {n}After exchanging a few sharp, prolonged binharic trills, the Tech-Priests seem to reach an agreement.{/n}

"I claim priority right to perform sacred diagnostics on the relic. My research of the xenos data will expedite understanding and the curing of the machine spirit's ailment." {n}After exchanging a few sharp, prolonged binharic trills, the Tech-Priests seem to reach an agreement.{/n}

"I claim priority right to perform sacred diagnostics on the relic. My research of the xenos data will expedite understanding and the curing of the machine spirit's ailment." {n}After exchanging a few sharp, prolonged binharic trills, the Tech-Priests seem to reach an agreement.{/n}

languages.text: «Reclamo derecho prioritario a realizar el diagnóstico sagrado de la reliquia. Mi investigación de los datos xenos acelerará la comprensión y la cura de la aflicción del espíritu máquina». {n}Después de intercambiar unos trinos intensos y prolongados en binario, los tecnosacerdotes parecen llegar a un acuerdo.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I claim priority right to perform sacred diagnostics on the relic. My research of the xenos data will expedite understanding and the curing of the machine spirit's ailment." {n}After exchanging a few sharp, prolonged binharic trills, the Tech-Priests seem to reach an agreement.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Reclamo derecho prioritario a realizar el diagnóstico sagrado de la reliquia. Mi investigación de los datos xenos acelerará la comprensión y la cura de la aflicción del espíritu máquina». {n}Después de intercambiar unos trinos intensos y prolongados en binario, los tecnosacerdotes parecen llegar a un acuerdo.{/n}

languages.text: “我主张优先获得对这件圣物进行神圣诊断的权利。通过对异形数据的研究，我可以更快地理解并治愈机魂的病症。”{n}技术神甫们在交换了一连串尖锐而漫长的二进制颤音后，似乎终于达成了一致。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I claim priority right to perform sacred diagnostics on the relic. My research of the xenos data will expedite understanding and the curing of the machine spirit's ailment." {n}After exchanging a few sharp, prolonged binharic trills, the Tech-Priests seem to reach an agreement.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我主张优先获得对这件圣物进行神圣诊断的权利。通过对异形数据的研究，我可以更快地理解并治愈机魂的病症。”{n}技术神甫们在交换了一连串尖锐而漫长的二进制颤音后，似乎终于达成了一致。{/n}

languages.text: "Ich bitte um das Vorrecht, heilige Diagnosen an dem Relikt durchzuführen. Meine Analyse der Xenosdaten werden das Verständnis für die Krankheit des Maschinengeistes fördern und ihre Heilung beschleunigen. {n}Nach dem Austausch einiger scharfer binhärischer Triller scheinen die Techpriester zu einer Übereinkunft zu gelangen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I claim priority right to perform sacred diagnostics on the relic. My research of the xenos data will expedite understanding and the curing of the machine spirit's ailment." {n}After exchanging a few sharp, prolonged binharic trills, the Tech-Priests seem to reach an agreement.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich bitte um das Vorrecht, heilige Diagnosen an dem Relikt durchzuführen. Meine Analyse der Xenosdaten werden das Verständnis für die Krankheit des Maschinengeistes fördern und ihre Heilung beschleunigen. {n}Nach dem Austausch einiger scharfer binhärischer Triller scheinen die Techpriester zu einer Übereinkunft zu gelangen.{/n}

languages.text: « Je revendique le droit prioritaire à procéder à des diagnostics sacrés sur la relique. Mes recherches sur les données xénos accéléreront notre compréhension et le traitement du mal qui ronge l'esprit de la machine. » {n}Après avoir échangé quelques trilles binhaires vifs et prolongés, les technoprêtres semblent parvenir à un accord.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I claim priority right to perform sacred diagnostics on the relic. My research of the xenos data will expedite understanding and the curing of the machine spirit's ailment." {n}After exchanging a few sharp, prolonged binharic trills, the Tech-Priests seem to reach an agreement.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Je revendique le droit prioritaire à procéder à des diagnostics sacrés sur la relique. Mes recherches sur les données xénos accéléreront notre compréhension et le traitement du mal qui ronge l'esprit de la machine. » {n}Après avoir échangé quelques trilles binhaires vifs et prolongés, les technoprêtres semblent parvenir à un accord.{/n}

languages.text: "Yadigâr üzerinde kutsal teşhis yapma önceliği hakkımı talep ediyorum. Zeno verileri üzerine yapacağım araştırma, anlayışı ve makine ruhunun rahatsızlığının iyileştirilmesini hızlandıracaktır." {n}Tekno Rahipler, birkaç keskin ve uzun ikilidil tını alışverişinden sonra bir anlaşmaya varmış gibi görünüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I claim priority right to perform sacred diagnostics on the relic. My research of the xenos data will expedite understanding and the curing of the machine spirit's ailment." {n}After exchanging a few sharp, prolonged binharic trills, the Tech-Priests seem to reach an agreement.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Yadigâr üzerinde kutsal teşhis yapma önceliği hakkımı talep ediyorum. Zeno verileri üzerine yapacağım araştırma, anlayışı ve makine ruhunun rahatsızlığının iyileştirilmesini hızlandıracaktır." {n}Tekno Rahipler, birkaç keskin ve uzun ikilidil tını alışverişinden sonra bir anlaşmaya varmış gibi görünüyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「この遺物に神聖な診断を行う権利を主張する。異星人のデータの研究は機械霊の病気を理解し治すのに役立つだろう。」{n}数回、鋭く長く続くビナリックの三音でやり取りした後、テクプリストたちは合意したようである。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I claim priority right to perform sacred diagnostics on the relic. My research of the xenos data will expedite understanding and the curing of the machine spirit's ailment." {n}After exchanging a few sharp, prolonged binharic trills, the Tech-Priests seem to reach an agreement.{/n}
